use_cases: Displaying user profile avatars with fallback initials in applications
Showing real-time user status indicators (online, offline, busy, away) in dashboards
Creating avatar components with border styling and sizing in user profile sections
Building user lists or team member displays with status indicators
Implementing avatar notification badges with positioning support
ai_summary: A composite Avatar component system built with Radix UI primitives and class-variance-authority. Provides five sub-components: Avatar, AvatarImage, AvatarFallback, AvatarIndicator, and AvatarStatus. Features multiple status variants (online/offline/busy/away) with colored indicators, supports overflow-hidden image handling, and includes border and sizing utilities. Designed for displaying user identity with graceful fallbacks to initials when images fail to load.
